name: Malicious Image Load via Excel
description: Detects the loading of an unsigned image by `excel.exe` from an Excel add-in file (`.xlam`, `.xla`, or `.xll`). This can indicate potential exploitation or the execution of malicious code embedded within the image or add-in.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the image load event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID for Image Load (7).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that loaded the image, which should be 'excel.exe'.

parameters.name: image_loaded
parameters.description: The full path to the loaded image file (an Excel add-in like .xlam, .xla, or .xll).

parameters.name: signed
parameters.description: Indicates whether the loaded image is digitally signed (expected to be 'false' for this detection).

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which Excel is running.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
